analysis.consistency: Consistent with standard D&D 5e spell structure and mechanics.
analysis.quality: High quality. The spell description is clear, mechanics are well-defined (casting time, range, components, save, effect, duration), and includes an 'At Higher Levels' clause.

mechanics.components: V, S, M (a morsel of food)
mechanics.effect: Charmed condition applied to a beast, requires a Wisdom save. Fails if target Intelligence is 4 or higher. Broken by harming the target or companions.
mechanics.scaling: Affects one additional beast per spell slot level above 1st.
mechanics.notes: The material component is consumed, indicated by the common notation for non-costly material components (though 'a morsel of food' suggests consumption).
